programs.title: Cycle Around Japan
programs.desc: , Episode 2, Season 1. A series showcasing the stunning landscapes featured in Cycle Around Japan. This time: the beautiful islands of Yamaguchi, and the historical scenery of the Izumo Highway. Zac Reynolds.

programs.title: Japanology Plus
programs.desc: . Sashiko is a type of traditional Japanese embroidery, once vital for the durability and warmth of clothes in cold climates. We explore how the charm of this enduring craft is being rediscovered. Peter Barakan, Kanako Sachno, Mamoru Abe, Hitoshi Nishiyama, Hirotaka Ohata, Sachiko Miyamoto, Kimiko Fukuda, Chiyo Kawahara.

programs.title: Nhk Newsline
programs.desc: . NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programs.title: Somewhere Street- A Little Stroll
programs.desc: A 15-minute spin-off of the "Somewhere Street" series, "A Short Stroll" explores cities through a traveler's eyes.Today we visit Hamelin, is famed for "The Pied Piper of Hamelin.

programs.title: Backstage Japan
programs.desc: . Join us for an exciting journey through the history of Japan's railroads, as we explore exhibitions delving into the Shinkansen, steam locomotives, and other archival gems.

programs.title: Sumopedia
programs.desc: . Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with insights into the sport’s techniques, traditions and legendary wrestlers. While the rules are simple, this iconic Japanese sport has far more depth than meets the eye.
